programme.title: Daisy & the Gumboot Kids
programme.desc: Daisy has returned from a visit to a farm where she met some cute piglets; inspired, she dusts off some old terracotta pots, paints them pink, and makes some pig pots with the Gumboot Kids.

programme.title: Jessie & the Gumboot Kids
programme.desc: The Gumboot Kids spot raccoons on a nature walk; Jessie Farrell sings a song about these mischievous and clever creatures; Scout and Daisy join the fun, too.

programme.desc: Ronny starts to bully Benny during a contest and the Hoppers stick up for their friend.

programme.title: Let's Go, Bananas!
programme.desc: The families are taking off for vacation aboard no-frills airline Jungle Jet. When Apple's tablet breaks, the kids try their best to entertain themselves on the never-ending flight.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Island Explorers
programme.sub-title: The Heat Is On; Castaway Calamity
programme.desc: A drought on Dino Island forces the Dino Ranchers to intervene as wild dinos fight over water; a mysterious 'sea creature' causes the Ranchers to crash the Jungle Jetter on an uncharted island.

programme.title: Toopy and Binoo: Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: No wind? Toopy and Binoo make their own wind for music.

programme.title: Toopy and Binoo: Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Toopy's magic dust makes him disappear mid-playdate.

programme.title: Kingdom Force
programme.desc: Jabari resigns his Kingdom Force spot to the legendary hero, Mittens McGuirk, and it's nothing less than a test of true teamwork to save the Plains Kingdom from a series of devastating geysers.

programme.title: Rusty Rivets
programme.desc: When Ranger Anna crash lands her planes in the distant savannah, Rusty and Ruby realize they need a new vehicle that can not only travel the distance, but aid them in their builds, and the Mobile Rivet Lab is born.

programme.title: Lana Longbeard
programme.desc: A renowned Oracle predicts that Lana will only bring ruin and disaster to her loved ones; she leaves the Mighty Windbreaker to live as a hermit on a small, deserted island to protect her crew from her jinx.

programme.desc: Summer challenges Debbie's version of how Billy died, and Will denies Sam's allegation.

programme.title: About That
programme.desc: Andrew Chang expands the understanding of the stories everybody's talking about.

programme.title: Rosemary Barton Live
programme.desc: Rosemary Barton delivers a weekly dose of compelling conversations and need-to-know political news and issues affecting Canadians.

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Driving into traffic jams plaguing cities across Canada to crown the country's worst commute, as we reveal the true cost of congestion and the solutions that aren't moving anywhere thanks to a lack of political will.

programme.title: Land and Sea
programme.desc: Summer and fall of 2025 brought drought and forest fires to Newfoundland and Labrador; towns are becoming more and more worried about water; well talk about the impacts of dryness.

programme.title: Still Standing
programme.desc: M'Chigeeng First Nation on Manitoulin Island was once the center for the Anishinaabe people; this changed dramatically when a series of treaties cut off the community from their traditional lands.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade dashes to Dubrovnik, Croatia, with Stephen Merchant for his final outing.

programme.title: Track and Field
programme.desc: From Gaborone, Botswana.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics
programme.desc: Jamie makes roasted stone fruit crumble. He also makes a Sardinian-inspired tomato sauce to go with a squash and ricotta ravioli.

programme.title: The Great Canadian Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The remaining potters find themselves playing electrician when creating a table lamp.

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: An entrepreneur hopes his business is worth a ton; a sibling duo look to harvest liquid assets; looking to distill a new trend.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The latest hockey action from across the NHL.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
